request.brief: Curate a 45-minute binge playlist from The Lizzie Bennet Diaries: witty vlog confessions, family drama beats, and will-they-won't-they tension for 18-34 female viewers.

response.channel_brief_interpretation: A 45-minute micro-drama playlist from The Lizzie Bennet Diaries sequenced for binge-friendly pacing — confessional vlog beats, family tension, and romantic glances tuned to 18-34 female co-viewing.

lineup.title: Romantic DM
lineup.programming_rationale: Slot 1 of 7 sequences "Romantic DM" from Ep 1 into the The Lizzie Bennet Diaries FAST block. Lizzie Bennet, Jane Bennet drive the moment: Editorially, "Romantic DM" is the pivot of Ep 1: Lizzie Bennet and Jane Bennet drive the hope → uncertainty arc.  Jane reads a heartfelt message aloud; Lizzie debates whether to reply on or off vlog. Placed here to sustain prime-time energy across the 45-minute lineup.
lineup.lead_in_note: Cold open: drop viewers into "Romantic DM" with Lizzie Bennet, Jane Bennet at peak stakes in Ep 1.
lineup.lead_out_note: Sets up "Confession cam" in Ep 3 by leaving Lizzie Bennet in unresolved tension.

lineup.title: Confession cam
